Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The Create method creates a callback target and returns it wrapped in a smart pointer compatible with LogManager.AddLogTarget.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: static std::unique_ptr<LogTargetCallback, ILogTarget::Deleter> Create(std::function<void(const std::string&, ILogger::Severity, const std::string&)> callback);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The callback to invoke with the message scope, severity, and text.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: A newly constructed LogTargetCallback object wrapped in a smart pointer that uses ILogTarget::Deleter.
